_note: NextConfig is defined in config-shared.ts and used across 83+ files. Key affected areas: config loading (config.ts loadConfig), server initialization (base-server.ts, next-server.ts), build pipeline (build/index.ts, webpack-config.ts), CLI entry points (next-build, next-dev, next-start), dev server, router server, and image optimizer. NextConfigComplete extends NextConfig. Verified via grep -rn 'NextConfig' across packages/next/src/.
